# Regex fixtures for skill: requesting-code-review
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin word boundaries: embedded review (pREVIEW) and embedded
# pr (imPRove, sPRint) must not fire a process-role skill.

MATCH: review this diff before i merge
MATCH: open a pull request for the auth fix
MATCH: can you check the changes in the auth module
MATCH: is this pr ready
MATCH: please re-review the fix

NO_MATCH: preview the deployment in staging
NO_MATCH: improve the sprint velocity for the team
NO_MATCH: merge the approved branch to main
